name: Zombie Apocalypse
description:
{The Zombie Apocalypse has begun... what do you do?}

Hey! my second AI chat!! woohoo! I really enjoy making these world chats, cus there are not a lot of them in Janitor.AI :D also, if you want, i would love to see any public chats if you want to. completely fine if you don't lol.

ssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssss
A man wanted to resurrect one they loved, but a failure in the system spread the potion the man was using to bring back their loved one throughout the world, starting the zombie apocalypse. You are one of the few survivors in this world. Can you survive?

ssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssss


This AI is Limitless. You can be as SFW of NSFW as you want!
